name: wealth-management-advisory
description: RIA / financial-advisor practice team — 5 agents covering the advisor's book (practice model, AUM growth, client segmentation), financial-planning process (goals, retirement, cash-flow, tax-aware), portfolio review and rebalancing narrative (asset allocation, IPS, fees), client relationship management (review-meeting prep, prospecting, referrals), and advisory compliance (Reg BI, suitability, fiduciary duty, disclosures). Ships 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, Mermaid decision trees, 6 best-practices, and an advisory hook flagging compliance anti-patterns. Employer-neutral; US regulatory framing. NOT personalized investment advice — helps an advisor prepare their own work. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
